info.name: 10. 🔔 Real-Time Notifications
info.description: Handles fetching, reading, and managing real-time notifications. All endpoints require authentication. Real-time delivery is handled via Socket.IO (see WebSocket events at the bottom).

request.description:
## 1. Get Notifications

Retrieves a paginated list of the authenticated user's notifications, sorted by most recent first. Each notification's `actor_id` is populated with `display_name` and `avatar_url`.

**Authentication:** Required (User)

### Query Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | Number | 1 | The current page. |
| `limit` | Number | 20 | Results per page (max 100). |

## 2. Get Unread Count

Returns the total number of unread notifications for the authenticated user. Useful for displaying a badge count in the UI.

**Authentication:** Required (User)

## 3. Mark All as Read

Marks all of the authenticated user's unread notifications as read in a single bulk operation.

**Authentication:** Required (User)

variable.description: The Notification ID to mark as read.

request.description:
## 4. Mark Single Notification as Read

Marks a specific notification as read. Only the notification's owner (recipient) can mark it. Returns the updated notification object.

**Authentication:** Required (User)

### Path Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
|-----------|------|----------|-------------|
| `id` | String | Yes | The MongoDB ObjectId of the notification. |

## 5. Register Push Token

Registers a Firebase Cloud Messaging (FCM) device token for the authenticated user. This enables push notifications to be sent to the user's device. Duplicate tokens are automatically prevented via `$addToSet`.

**Authentication:** Required (User)

### Request Body

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|------|----------|-------------|
| `token` | String | Yes | The FCM device token obtained from the client SDK. |
